name: Honey Mustard Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chives for a sweet taste.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Form into a loaf and place in a greased baking dish.
4. Allow to rise until doubled in size.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving. Great for sandwiches or simply toasted.
